---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or use case

What problem would this solve, or what workflow would it improve?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you’d like (e.g. new flag, new collector, UI change).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Examples, mockups, or links if helpful.
